programme.title: America's Dirty Divide
programme.desc: A series examining the country's vast environmental inequalities and how climate change will make things worse. (S1 E01)

programme.title: The Great Abandonment: the extraordinary exodus of India's migrant labourers
programme.desc: In 2020, the Indian prime minister, Narendra Modi, announced one of the harshest Covid lockdowns in the world, causing nearly 200 million migrant labourers to be stranded without wages, food and housing. Many undertook long journeys to return to their home villages, while others, caught in limbo with their families, were forced to wait, living on the street or under the flyovers they had once laboured to build. And as workers' rights eroded, the push for unionisation gathered momentum in the country. Filmed in Mumbai, this documentary reveals the deep divide between those who have and those who do not, while questioning the actions of India's leader

programme.title: Qandeel
programme.desc: The life, death and impact of Pakistan's working-class icon Qandeel Baloch, killed in 2016 after becoming a social media celebrity. This film tells Qandeel's story through her own videos and media appearances. A young, fearless woman who collided with Pakistan's mainstream media, Qandeel exposed the religious right and challenged middle-class morality.

programme.title: Dear Mamma: a transgender man, his mother and their journey in letters
programme.desc: When Naissa tells his mother Daniela that he identifies as a trans man she struggles to understand. Through candid personal letters exchanged over three years, Dear Mamma follows Naissa as he stands firmly for his independence and identity, and Daniela as she wrestles with her fear of losing a child. As Naissa embarks on his professional dance career and proudly embodies his gender, his mother also embarks on a journey of understanding and acceptance of her son's choices

programme.title: White Fright
programme.desc: In 2015, the community of Islamberg discovered that a Tennessee minister was plotting the deadliest attack on US soil since 9/11 against their village. Why have Americans heard nothing about him, and why has the safety of this community been ignored?

programme.title: Crannog
programme.desc: Alexis has a life-threatening disease. She spends her time in the wooded expanse of northern Scotland, where she takes care of dozens of animals who are also sick, wounded or dying. Some have terminal cancer, some would otherwise be killed because of their disabilities, some were saved from slaughterhouses. Alexis provides palliative care for them.

programme.title: Dwarfism and me: 'We're still treated as less than human'
programme.desc: About 90,000 people in America have dwarfism. The writer and podcaster Cara Reedy takes us on a journey to reflect on what it means to be a person with dwarfism – and why America's obsession with little people has left lasting damage.

programme.title: RIP SENI: racism, graffiti and the UK's mental health crisis
programme.desc: One morning in June 2020, graffiti reading RIP SENI appeared emblazoned across a public artwork outside the Bethlem royal hospital, a psychiatric hospital in south London. The spray-painted letters drew attention to Olaseni Lewis, a 23-year-old black man who died after being restrained by 11 police officers while in the care of the hospital in 2010. This film follows what happened after the graffiti, as it launches a discussion about race, mental health and injustice in the UK, and the effects on families.

programme.title: My Blonde GF: a disturbing story of deepfake pornography
programme.desc: Helen's world is turned upside down when she discovers that her face has been digitally edited on to images of women in sexually explicit and often violent situations. Helen shares the impact this deepfake pornography has had on her life and challenges a culture that treats women's appearance and image as public property while the perpetrators remain anonymous. Deepfake pornography is an increasingly common form of image-based sexual abuse and in June 2023, an amendment of the online safety bill was announced that criminalises the sharing of deepfake intimate images online.

programme.title: Syrian refugees: the dangerous sea journey to Europe | In troubled waters: the rescue crew saving migrants in the Mediterranean
programme.desc: A Syrian refugee, now settled in Coventry, Britain, describes the hardship of the dangerous Mediterranean crossing that brought her to safety. She and another woman share the dream of being reunited with their families, who are both stuck in Greece. | The Guardian spends five days with the Migrants Offshore Aid Station (MOAS) meetings its crew and the migrants it saved.

programme.title: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Mohamedou Ould Salahi and one of his former guards, Steve Wood, reunite in Mauritania 13 years after last seeing each other, rekindling an unlikely relationship that profoundly changed their lives. Mohamedou was a prisoner at Guantanamo Bay for 14 years. During his incarceration he was subjected to torture and solitary confinement, but never charged with a crime. His memoir, Guantanamo Diary, became an international bestseller and was adapted into the film, The Mauritanian.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The Leverage team helps a beleaguered National Guardsman to find justice against the unscrupulous construction firm who foreclosed on his home. Knowing all too well what it feels like to fail as a father, Nate seeks solace in the bottle, putting the team – and the con – in serious jeopardy.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: Elite financial investigators raid a middle class home and people smuggling comes under the Proceeds of Crime spotlight.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: Devious fraudsters making money out of victims are investigated by the police, and have their ill gotten gains seized to pay back the victims.

programme.title: Born To Kill?
programme.desc: A profile of Donald Gaskins Jr, also known as Pee Wee'.

programme.title: Deadly Dates
programme.desc: A look at the murder of Nadine Aburas, a woman from Cardiff who was killed by a wealthy businessman she met in 2012 on a popular dating site.

programme.title: Narcos
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a massive military effort to take Pablo into custody, the family reunites while enemies worry. Steve and Connie fight about safety.

programme.title: Narcos
programme.desc: Tata gets impatient with life on the run. Pablo responds to President Gaviria's reward offer. Steve and Javier meet their new boss.

programme.title: The Hatton Garden Job
programme.desc: Four ageing East End criminals – led by 76 year-old Brian drill into a steel-and-concrete secured safety deposit vault in London's Hatton Garden jewellery quarter. With everyone from the Hungarian mob to Scotland Yard on their tail, will they commit the crime of the century or pay with their lives?

programme.desc: Romance starts to blossom between George and his former college classmate Diane, after Jerry falsely tells her that George is a successful marine biologist. programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Investigate released documents regarding alien and UFO encounters, made accessible to the public in 2011 by the Freedom of Information Act. We investigate mass UFO sightings, personal abductions, government cover-ups and breaking alien news from around the world. We delve into the "photoshopping" of space, the value of Wikileaks, and the role social media plays in alien stories.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Former `Top Gear' presenter and opinionated `The Sunday Times' and `The Sun' columnist Jeremy Clarkson presents the rebooted version of `Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?', the 12-question quiz with a £1,000,000 prize. Each contestant can use three traditional lifelines: 50-50 which removes half of the answers, Ask the Audience which polls the studio audience for their answer, and Phone a Friend, wherein the contestant can call a friend for 30 seconds to ask for their advice. However, there is now a fourth lifeline: Ask the Host, where the contestant can ask Clarkson if he knows the answer to the question, and there is also a new second `safety net', previously set at £32,000, which is now able to be set by the contestant themselves. Also, contestants must first win their chance to play the quiz by winning the Fastest Fingers First round, competing against other potential players to be the quickest to answer a question with sequenced answers.

programme.title: Most Haunted

A girl is said to have died there after a cruel joke went wrong, and she may now wander through the caves in a wedding dress.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visits Mary King's Close in Edinburgh's Old Town, once home to hundreds of tenants until eventually sealed up. Many of its residents died of the plague, and a fire raged in 1750 - a child's head, a severed arm, and a little girl in a blue dress are just some of the apparitions reported.

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain presents a quirky, tongue-in-cheek take on classic television holiday shows. Tony and his pal, Michael Ruhlman, plan a huge potluck holiday dinner. But when things go awry, they end up at a Chinese restaurant.

programme.title: Into America's Wild
programme.desc: Step off the beaten path and connect to your inner trailblazer in this cross-country journey to some of the most beautiful but little-known landscapes of North America. Into America's Wild is a non-stop ride via kayak, train, bike, hot air balloon and more that explores the transformational allure of wild places and the human connection we all share with the natural world.

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Ellis Family explores Washington D.C., discovering monuments, Ford's Theatre, and the best cupcakes in the capital! (S1 E01)

programme.title: Wild Travels
programme.desc: Will finds himself in the middle of an ice cream catastrophe at Ben & Jerry's Factory in Waterbury, Vermont mingles with mermaids at the underwater show in Weeki Wachee, Florida achieves speeds of 5 miles per hour on the cog wheel train to the summit of Mt. Washington, New Hampshire buys new kicks at a Sneaker convention in Cleveland and marvels at Bug Art portraits at a museum in St. Johnsbury, Vermont.

programme.title: Wild Travels
programme.desc: Will tries and fails to ride an alligator at Orlando's Gatorland drops in on the only used car dealership with a priceless collection of Muhammad Ali memorabilia in New Hampshire dabbles in the paranormal at the abandoned and haunted West Virginia State Penitentiary and then meets an outrageous artist who is creating a psychedelic city block in Pittsburgh known as “Randyland.”

programme.title: Wild Travels
programme.desc: Will learns the hazards and rewards of professional Golf Ball Diving in Kissimmee, Florida considers defecting to a foreign country at a library that sits smack dab on the Vermont – Canadian border discovers a Hari Krishna commune with an incredible “Palace of Gold” in the hills of West Virginia marvels at outdoor sculptures at the African-American Heritage Museum in Hammond, Louisiana, and catches his breath in Donora, Pennsylvania at the world's only “Smog Museum.”

programme.title: Dr. Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Dive into the disagreements that have kept a horse-loving young woman dog-free.

programme.title: Dr. Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Find out if getting to know a real pup could ease a little girl's fear of dogs.

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife
programme.desc: Join the team through moments of celebration, anxiety, and reflection.

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife
programme.desc: Watch Hope take on more animals as she battles her own health issues.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Learn if super sniffers can sense a deadly snake, then sit in on pangolin rehab.

programme.title: The Big Feed
programme.desc: Explore the activities zoo staff introduce to keep the animal's boredom at bay.

programme.title: The Big Feed
programme.desc: See how the zookeepers feed the animals that swim, dip, and dive.

programme.title: The Big Feed
programme.desc: Witness the critical task of feeding animals that are on the edge of extinction.

programme.title: The Big Feed
programme.desc: Learn the strategies staff employ to feed the zoo's most dangerous species.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Watch Chris perform a cesarean on a pug, remove a hook from a staffy, and more.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Join Chris as he tries to save a couple of sick dogs before visiting a python.

programme.title: Habsburgs' Homeland
programme.desc: Long before becoming a ruling dynasty, the Habsburgs were tied to a castle in modern Switzerland. Erbe Österreich explores their roots at Habichtsburg and the move to Vienna under Rudolf I. Highlights include Aargau's Muri Abbey, where ties endure, and where the hearts of Austria's last imperial couple, Karl and Zita, are interred.

programme.title: William and Kate: A Royal Love Story
programme.desc: For the ten year anniversary, this documentary is the definitive account of the love story between William and the girl who is to become his Queen.

programme.title: Royal Children: Prince William and Prince Harry
programme.desc: They were born into the most famous royal family in the world, its history and traditions stretching back centuries.

programme.title: Bastions of Power
programme.desc: Castles were bastions of power and the site of countless battles. The documentary examines their military function from the 11th to the 16th century. When the enemy was at their gates, they had to withstand battering rams, catapults and sapping which called for ever new solutions by their defenders until, finally, large-calibre cannons spelt their end. Our journey takes us all through Europe, while historians and archaeologists will guide us through a fascinating panorama of medieval warfare.

programme.title: Inside Buckingham Palace
programme.desc: From Queen Victoria to Queen Elizabeth II and all the ceremonies and scandals inbetween, enter the world of Buckingham Palace.

programme.title: Princess Diana: A Day in the Life
programme.desc: After she became a royal, Princess Diana's life was turned upside down and would never be the same again. What was it like for Diana? This insightful documentary strives to answer this question.

programme.title: Extraordinary Royal Wedding
programme.desc: For most mothers, organising any wedding is stressful enough. But what if you are also an Australian born Royal Princess and expected to supervise complex Hindu traditions stretching back centuries?

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play, a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls plan a formal afternoon lawn party tea to inaugurate their new dog park. Plum is in charge of decorations, Cherry music, and Strawberry snacks. There's even a giant, dog-shaped ice sculpture. As the girls get dressed, Raspberry puts the finishing touches on the high-fashion hats that will accompany their beautiful gowns. At last everything is ready. But when the gate opens... the puppies back away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: To convince the dance-averse Huckleberry to attend the big masquerade ball at the dog park, Blueberry promises she'll stay by his side the whole evening and make sure he doesn't have to dance. But as the day of the ball dawns, Blueberry awakens with a bad cold. She doesn't know how to tell Huck that she can't go to the ball. Lemon and Raspberry misinterpret her sniffles, thinking she's so heartbroken to be disappointing Huck that she's crying!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Berry Biggest, Berry Baddest Bakeoff
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is abuzz as Berrykin Bloom introduces the biggest, juiciest, strangest fruit anyone has ever seen! It's the size of a house, shaped like a strawberry, colored like a watermelon and has a spiky pineapple top. "I call it the sparklestrawwaterpineberry!" says Berrykin Bloom. Princess Berrykin declares it the greatest achievement in Berryculture she's ever witnessed.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry's fashion podcast is saved by Apple, then almost sabotaged by Sweet and Sour when Lemon's "mood hair" runs amok, acting like the bickering twins, and the twins' comical argument is accidentally broadcast on the "berrynet."

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Sour wishes she could have a birthday all her very own, her twin sister Sweet grants her wish by forgoing celebrating her birthday. But what begins as a day that Sour has always dreamed of quickly becomes a disappointment when she misses her twin. With Strawberry's help, Sour gives her birthday back to Sweet with a special surprise.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When a comedy of errors causes Orange, Plum and Cherry to arrive late to their campout, they start off their annual tradition of telling tall-tales around the campfire.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the urging of Honey Pie Pony, Strawberry & Friends decide to put on a Cooking Show. Ginger Snap invents a version of TV, which she calls Berryvision, to broadcast the show all over Strawberryland.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Berry Blossom Festival is underway and everyone in Strawberryland is having a Grand Time, thanks to the selfless efforts of Strawberry Shortcake: she's really giving this festival all she has!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance - and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's winter and the pond's frozen and that means Strawberry and friends can ice skate! They decide to showcase their talents at an Ice Dance Show. But just then, a new kid named Apricot shows up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends are getting the band back together to perform at a local festival, but Ginger Snap is out of town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake has always dreamed of seeing a certain rare flower, which only blooms once every ten years - and then only for a day!

programme.title: The Photograph

programme.desc: Mr. Bean is locked in a department store overnight having the time of his life.

programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket demands that Bean stay in to take delivery of a new lounge chair.

programme.title: Eau De Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean accidentally spills all of Mrs. Wicket's new, expensive perfume on the floor.

programme.title: The Big Freeze
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wakes up on a freezing cold winter's morning to discover that the boiler is broken.

programme.title: For Sale
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket is persuaded by a jaunty estate agent to put her house up for sale.

programme.title: Bean Shopping
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is locked in a department store overnight having the time of his life.

programme.title: In the Pink
programme.desc: Mr Bean, badgered by a strange pink animal, warms to the creature when it shows its true colours.

programme.title: Wedding Day
programme.desc: A wedding car crashes, resulting in Bean coming to the rescue and offering the bride a lift.

programme.title: Bean Phone
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants a smartphone but does not have enough money to buy one.

programme.title: Valuable Lessons
programme.desc: Two burglars hatch up an evil plan in which one of them disguises himself as a gentleman.

programme.title: Goldfish
programme.desc: Mr Bean nearly gets fed to the fish!

programme.title: Litterbugs
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is furious with the untidy state of the streets so he goes on a one-man mission to clean up the town.

programme.title: A Royal Makeover
programme.desc: Mr Bean redecorates his room, making it fit for a Queen.

programme.title: Coconut Shy
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to buy a cup for Teddy, but he has no money.

programme.title: No Parking
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't find a parking space. So he makes one of his own.

programme.title: No Parking
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't find a parking space. So he makes one of his own.

programme.title: Where Did You Get That Cat?
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket has a new hat that looks like Scrapper.

programme.title: Scout Bean

programme.title: Ice Cream
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants an ice cream cone from the ice cream van.

programme.title: Chocks Away
programme.desc: Mr Bean's hobby goes down in flames in his battle for air supremacy.

programme.title: Car Trouble
programme.desc: Mr Bean takes to the air after being taken for a ride.

programme.title: Car Wash
programme.desc: After a stubborn bird deliberately defecates his Mini, Mr. Bean washes it.

programme.title: Super-Trolley
programme.desc: Mr Bean builds a supermarket super trolley.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

programme.title: A Time Of Traitors
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity. Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

programme.title: The Mask Of Deception
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers. The ninja find themselves scattered to the four corners of the kingdom. Cole and Jay are searching in vain for some sign of Master Wu. Nya fights injustice in the north, while Kai and Zane attempt to fend off an angry lava beast in the west. This leaves Lloyd alone in Ninjago City. He rushes to the scene of a heist at Borg Tower and finds himself up against a team of highly trained operatives led by the mysterious masked MISTER-E. Lloyd fails to prevent the heist and an ancient artifact, the MASK OF DECEPTION, is stolen. Lloyd apprehends one of the criminals but the others escape. Dismayed by his failure, Lloyd calls the ninjas back to Ninjago. The friends are reunited and hope for a little rest and relaxation. These hopes are dashed with the arrival MASTER HUTCHINS, a servant of the Royal Family of Ninjago, who has been sent by the EMPEROR to request their help. A new criminal gang, SONS OF GARMADON (SOG), is attempting to acquire three ancient masks called the ONI MASKS, which are rumored to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Gray Knight
programme.desc: Using his Stone to Life magic the Cloud of Monstrox turns Clay into a living, fighting, breathing stone fighting knight. But will Clay use his forces to fight for good or for evil? Does he have a choice? The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro are able to unlock the forbidden Power Shocking Scare and unleash an attack on the village of Bravington. Knights in their new vehicles rush to the rescue and are able to defeat him with a new Combo Power. In the heat of the battle, the Cloud of Monstrox sees the stone statue of Clay and zaps him to life! Clay is now turned, and is fighting against his friends. It is impossible for them to defeat him without destroying him for good. The Cloud urges Clay on. He attacks the Fortrex in order to get to Merlok. Robin in his Black Knight Mech is trying to stop him, but to no avail. Merlok 2.0 is left undefended. At the very last moment Merlok 2.0 unleashes a blasting spell that sends Clay far far away.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad And The Tightwad
programme.desc: Clay wakes up in the poor town of Nothing Hill which literally have nothing. Will Clay remember who he is and what he is fighting for. His friends try to help him, but Jorah Tightwad and his Bots get in the way. Clay as the Gray Knight wakes up far away in a place called Nothing Hill. A poor town where they literally have nothing. They harvest dust. Jorah Tightwad though has found that there is gold underneath the town. He convinces the confused Clay to help him put pressure on the poor townsfolk to give up their lots. This is an easy job for the strong Gray Knight. The NEXO KNIGHTS finally track him down and tries to convince him about who he is. But to the Gray Knight they are still his enemies, and a giant battle ensues in order to subdue the Gray Knight. At last, only Macy is left. When she begins to recite the Knights Code, some words and their meaning are able to get through the stone hard shell of the Gray Knight and the Evil that clouded him seems to disappear. Together they are able to return the ownership of the town to the villagers.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Chased Dreamers
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau, Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch. Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere... Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects! Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar. Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower.

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

The ninja find themselves scattered to the four corners of the kingdom. Cole and Jay are searching in vain for some sign of Master Wu. He rushes to the scene of a heist at Borg Tower and finds himself up against a team of highly trained operatives led by the mysterious masked MISTER-E. A new criminal gang, SONS OF GARMADON (SOG), is attempting to acquire three ancient masks called the ONI MASKS, which are rumored to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream proposes a truce to Megatron, but Dreadwing threatens to stand in the way of his return.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The quest for the Omega Lock takes the Autobots and the Decepticons to Cyberton for an epic battle.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots question Optimus' leadership abilities.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sari has to defend the Autobot home base from invading Constructicons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron comes up with a plan to build a space bridge to Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots battle against the Decepticons in a fate to save both Earth and Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Octane and Trypticon conspire to help the greedy King Fakaddi.

programme.sub-title: Forever is a Long Time Coming

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Wheelie and Daniel risk capture by the Decepticons to give their friend Ultra Magnus a birthday party.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Grimlock and Daniel are accidentally transported into a dimension of wizards and warriors.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: While Optimus struggles to survive after Megatron's destruction of the Autobot base.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots search for signs of each other, but start to lose hope.

programme.desc: Hot Shot insists they should take vengeance on the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With the Autobot ship ready to leave, Hot Shot refuses to let the children accompany them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfing For Gold: Gargamel the evil wizard is in trouble again. If he can't find an enormous amount of gold by sundown, all his possessions will be taken away from him. But the Smurfs are going to help their arch-enemy... Up to a point.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Magic Rattle: The Smurfs help a fairy queen outwit the evil fairy Fallon who tries to take away her son's magic rattle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Now You Smurf 'Em, Now You Don't: The underground trolls who want them to be their slaves capture the Smurfs. Papa Smurf ingeniously frees them and then destroys the trolls' magic crystal ball that gives them power over the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy Goes On Strike: Get up early in the morning, before any other Smurf is out of bed, to prepare a scrumptious Smurfberry muffin. Spend all morning on preparing Smurf delicacies for lunch. Than all afternoon to have dinner ready – and delicious – on time. And do you get so much as a thank you form the Smurfs? So Greedy Smurf quits. The Village is in trouble... And soon, so is Greedy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tis The Season To Be Smurfy: This is Wild Smurf's first Christmas, and he's impressed by the decorations in the Village of the Smurfs. But Grandpa and Sassette are going to teach him the real meaning of Christmas when they help an old couple to live the most beautiful Christmas they've ever seen...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Grouchy Makes A Splash: We all know Grouchy Smurf hates a lot of things. But one thing he hates more than anything else is water, when there is enough of it to drown in. You see, Grouchy can't swim. And when the Smurfs notice this peculiarity and try to teach him how to survive in water, the evil wizard Gargamel makes things a little more dangerous than they ought to be....

programme.title: Jokey's Joke Book
programme.desc: Jokey Smurf's joke boxes are no longer funny to the other Smurfs. Jokey finds new ideas in his Great Joke Book, but these ideas are even less popular in the Village. And here comes the evil Gargamel with a few jokes of his own...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Tear Of A Smurf: A beautiful princess is turned into a hag and needs the whiskers of a cat and the tear of a Smurf for her magic potion. Azrael, Grouchy and Jokey unwittingly cooperate and as the magical transformation takes place, the princess frees them and they happily hurry home.

programme.title: The Answer Smurf
programme.desc: Nobody ever listens to Brainy Smurf's advice, and when Papa Smurf is away and Brainy feels he's in charge, he decides he's going to be the one with all the answers. There is a magic formula in Papa Smurf's Book of Spells that ensures everyone in the Village of the Smurfs is going to ask for Brain's opinion. As if matters weren't difficult enough, here's Gargamel...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's Enchanted Didey: When Gargamel is able to make a flying carpet out of a patchwork quilt, accidents are bound to happen...The result of one accident is that a piece of the flying bedspread is used as Baby Smurf's diaper, with very surprising results...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Prince And The Hopper: What is that strange talking frog that Morlock the Wizard sends all of Prince Theodore's soldiers to catch? Is it a demon frog, as he says, or something else? Truth will out when Smurfette and the Smurflings meet the frog. They help to change this frog back into Prince Theodore himself, for he's been the victim of a spell cast by Morlock.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's First Word: The Smurflings free the Smurfs from the clutches of Gargamel just in time to get Baby to its first word ceremony. Baby utters the word « Gargamel ». Papa Smurf says that this word indicates that Baby will one day become the Great Chief, as he is aware of the dangers in life.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Every Picture Smurfs A Story: The evil Maestro's magical paints have the power to transport his models onto canvas – forever! Papa Smurf directs Painter to switch his paints and before long, Maestro is enshrined in a picture next to his dream girl, Smurfette.

programme.title: The Gallant Smurf
programme.desc: Queen Felicity will not let her son, Prince Godfrey, marry his sweetheart Pricilla. What she wants as a daughter-in-law is a girl who shows her something she's never seen before. When Hogatha learns of this, and also discovers the existence of Grandpa Smurf, she feels confident that she can surprise the Queen with her capture. Of course, Hogatha must first capture Grandpa Smurf...

programme.title: Bringing Up Bigfeet
programme.desc: Remember Bigmouth, the ogre, and his lovely wife Bignose? They have a baby now: tiny (by ogre standards) Bigfeet. As the Smurflings Snappy, Slouchy and Nat, and of course the ever-willing Sassette are not entitled to baby-sit Baby Smurf, they volunteer to watch over Bigfeet, while its parents are at the Ogre Ball. The little Smurfs will get more than what they expected...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Mutiny On The Smurf: King Symphonium sends his pelican, Satchelmouth, to scoop up Brainy's orchestra and carry them to his island. Dreamy takes the helm of a ship to set sail for their rescue. When Dreamy gets seasick, Brainy takes command and leads the rescue party that frees the captured Smurfs.

programme.title: Reckless Smurfs
programme.desc: This time, Gargamel's plan cannot fail. Undeterred by Azrael's derisive cackling, the evil wizard perfects a magic substance called Daredevil Dust, which is going to change all the Smurfs into rash, incautious swashbucklers. Will Papa Smurf fall into Gargamel's trap? Will their enemy catch all the Smurfs? Will this story have a happy ending?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Time Capsule: As the Smurfs busily build a time capsule for all of their talents, Papa Smurf frantically tries to unravel an ancient Druid riddle before disaster strikes the forest.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Springtime: The wicked wizard Gargamel asks the sorcerer Balthazar for a recipe to capture the Smurfs. It involves kidnapping Mother Nature to stop the arrival of Spring. Luckily, the Smurfs save the day.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play 'Boo', but stop to watch Ned help his dad plant and water some geraniums. In Teletubbyland, nine pretty flowers and a watering can appear.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies see a little girl and her brother who love salad. They go shopping in a market a market with their grandma to buy some salad to eat.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children looking at penguins waddling and swimming. In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies play walk fast and slow, far and near and other different ways.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up from behind a hill to watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty sausage. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Po go for a walk, so Laa-Laa decides to dance a secret dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies are trying to be quiet. They watch Oscar read the story of the Gingerbread Boy to his brother Felix. A voice trumpet appears and sings the nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and teaches the Teletubbies a winter nursery rhyme. Po's present is a little frosty cloud that begins to snow. All the Teletubbies laugh as they play in the snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa sit down to eat some Tubby Custard. Po wants some too. She tries to eat the other's Tubby Custard, but they won't let her.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little boy peel and mash some eggs for an egg mayonnaise sandwich. The Teletubbies laugh when they make a tune whilst eating their Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number two. Dipsy and Laa-Laa are eating Tubby Toast. They play the game 'Two Little Teletubbies', but while they are playing the Noo-Noo tidies up their Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance a jumping dance before stopping to watch Yvette wash up her plastic cups and saucers. The Teletubbies have a very messy day. So Noo-Noo has to tidy everything up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It's time for the Teletubbies to do their exercises. A voice trumpet rises and the Teletubbies stretch up and down to it's instructions.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep, but Noo-Noo tidies up their blankets. They stop chasing him to watch some children learn about the number five. A flashing light appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It's Christmas time on Sodor and Edward is with Salty at the Docks. Edward's excited. Christmas time is present time!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: On the Island of Sodor, it's Sodor Surprise Day! This is the day when everyone on Sodor has fun surprising each other and making them laugh!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It's Christmas time on Sodor and there's been a disaster! Sir Topham Hatt has lost his top hat! Emily is given the very important job of finding it.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It is the day of the Sodor Farmer's Fair! There's a lot to do for all the engines. James is given the important job of taking Farmer McColl's sheep to the Fair.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: At the Docks, Whiff looks in wonder at the mighty Spencer. The Mayor tells Spencer that he is fast, strong, and loud which makes Spencer a very grand engine indeed!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: There is great excitement on Sodor. Stafford, the new shunting engine, is at the Steamworks. He's electric and runs on batteries, so everyone wants to meet him!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It's Christmas and at the Blue Mountain Quarry, Rheneas hears that Thomas is going to collect a Christmas tree from Misty Island!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Up in the hills, on the Narrow Gauge Railway, Peter Sam is excited. The Thin Controller has to go down for a meeting with Sir Topham Hatt. He has asked Peter Sam to be in charge while he is away.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It's Sir Topham Hatt's birthday! He introduces Thomas to Winston - Sir Topham Hatt's new track inspection vehicle.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.sub-title: Sodor's Legend of the Lost Treasure
programme.desc: Surprises await Thomas and his friends as they dig up their most daring adventure yet. Unearthing an old pirate ship, Thomas is on the hunt for Sodor's lost treasure.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: The race is on! Competing at The Great Railway Show with the best engines from around the globe, Thomas and his friends are in for a world of adventure!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: A photograph of the engines is to be taken for a big billboard, but mayhem ensues when Diesel accidentally rolls in front of the camera and obscures Thomas!

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Edward is chosen to deliver a new brass water wheel to the water works. There's trouble ahead when the proud engine decides to take the scenic route in order to show his friends his special delivery.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: It is carnival time on Sodor and Rosie is hoping to pull the special coaches. But when the job is given to Emily, Rosie decides to show her worth by attempting to shift the funfair herself...

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: The famous storyteller, Miss Marvel, gets ready to tell her tale of Proteus the Mystical Engine.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: When the Sodor Wishing Tree is damaged in a storm, Henry makes every effort to prevent some woodsmen from reaching it and chopping it down.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: The Fat Controller asks Thomas to show Hank, the new engine, around the island. Thomas doesn't take to Hank's brash personality and refuses to let Hank help him with his important jobs.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Toby thinks he isn't as important as the other engines and tries to make up for it by finding something special for the Fat Controller. But his search only causes confusion and delay...

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Emily is declared "excellent" by the Fat Controller and it goes straight to her head. When she is given an important job to do, she comes across a series of tricky situations.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends
programme.desc: Freddie decides to hold the winter party at the wharf as a special surprise for his friend Colin.

programme.title: YuGiOh Zexal
programme.desc: Girag's got revenge on his mind and Ray in his sights, but when Yuma steps in to save the day, the Ray Way steers Yuma off course!

Dennis decides there's only one thing for it - they're going to have to bust open the vault. He knows just the menaces for the job... but someone has to crack the complicated mathematical code - and the only man for the job is Walter. If Dennis can get him to join the gang, then Beanotown school is about to witness the biggest heist it's ever seen.

programme.title: Epic Movie
programme.desc: Two of the warped writers of Scary Movie now set their parodic sights on the largest genre of them all: Hollywood's big-budget, special effects-laden, blockbuster franchise films.

programme.title: Renegade

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Android Cop
programme.desc: In this futuristic, action-packed thriller, a cop and his robotic partner enter the Zone, a forbidden section of the city inhabited by a disease-stricken populace. Together, they discover the real reason everyone is sick, and attempt to stop the illness.

programme.title: Dragon Blade

programme.title: Take Down
programme.desc: A group of wealthy teenagers must fight for their lives when a remote school is taken over by dangerous criminals.

programme.title: Waiting for You
programme.desc: Paul (Morgan) investigates his late father's increasingly disturbing past and becomes suspicious of the mysterious, melancholic, and possibly dangerous Madeleine (Ardant).

programme.title: The 100 Year Old Man Who Climbed Out The Window And Disappeared
programme.desc: After living a long and colorful life, Allan Karlsson finds himself stuck in a nursing home. On his 100th birthday, he leaps out a window and begins an unexpected journey.

programme.title: Tangent Room
programme.desc: Trapped in a mysterious room with no escape, four brilliant minds race against time to prevent a cosmic collapse of the universe. They must learn to work together and solve the puzzle before it's too late.

programme.title: Executor
programme.desc: A ruthless assassin, trained to kill in the name of God by a corrupt priest, re-evaluates his life purpose after saving a little boy from one of his own assassination attempts.

programme.title: Mistletoe Mixup
programme.desc: A workaholic with no time for romance, or the holidays ends up meeting two potential suitors on the same day, but unbeknownst to her, they turn out to be brothers. A sibling squabble commences in this holiday romance.

programme.title: A Model Christmas
programme.desc: Cali, an up-and-coming model, sees that there is more to life than just work when she and her driver, Jack, are forced to seek shelter from the winter weather at Jack's family home.

programme.title: Christmas Angel
programme.desc: Ashley feels alone this Christmas as she searches fruitlessly for a job to support herself and her dog, Dash. But her neighbor Nick knows exactly what to do. He offers her a job as his assistant in the best work of all----helping others. There's only one catch: Ashley can't tell anyone that her boss is a sort of Secret Santa. When a nosy reporter, Will, takes interest in Ashley, she struggles to keep Nick's secret while protecting her heart.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Romance
programme.desc: Actress Emma Hutton is determined to help find her friend Hope a perfect match but in doing so, she accidentally tramples on several hearts. When Emma realizes she herself has always loved her good friend Gray, Emma learns love works best when she doesn't meddle with it. A charming romance inspired by Jane Austen's "Emma."

programme.title: Lucy Shimmers And The Prince Of Peace
programme.desc: Second chances start when a hardened criminal crosses paths with a precocious little girl who is helped by an angel to change hearts during the holiday season.

programme.title: They Called Him Trinity
programme.desc: An ex-sheriff sets out to find the bandits who beat and murdered his sister.

programme.title: The Ruthless Four
programme.desc: In Nevada, prospector Sam Cooper and his partner strike gold. But Sam's greedy partner starts shooting at Sam who takes refuge inside the gold mine.

programme.title: Hell's Outpost
programme.desc: A Korean war veteran attempts to help a small town mine owner develop his tungsten mine in spite of efforts by the town boss to stop him.

programme.title: Call of the Forest
programme.desc: Bob Brand is looking for a lost gold mine. Storm Cloud makes friends with Bob's son Bobby and to repay Bob for the help he gave the Indians, he gives a map locating the mine to the boy.

programme.title: Django Challenges Sartana
programme.desc: Framed for a bank robbery, bounty killer Django's brother, Steve is lynched.

programme.title: Holiday in The Hamptons
programme.desc: A woman inherits her grandfather's home in the Hamptons and reconnects with her childhood love.

programme.title: Love Notes
programme.desc: Starring Laura Leighton and Antonio Cupo. When a classical music critic becomes pregnant from a brief encounter with a country music star, she decides it is the perfect way for her infertile best friend to have a baby.

programme.title: Fixing Up Christmas
programme.desc: Known as a “fixer” for difficult clients, a talented party planner must help a young CEO plan the Christmas party of the year to dazzle the mayor and save his company. Wil the "fixer" fix something more than just the company?

programme.title: Sincerely, Yours Truly
programme.desc: When Hayley finds a wedding ring with a letter hidden in a drawer in her new condo, she decides to write back… and the mysterious lover replies, starting a chain of letters and events that will change her life for ever!

programme.title: June Again
programme.desc: During a fleeting bout of lucidity from her dementia, June Wilton has precious little time to bring together her estranged children, save the family business, and rekindle an old flame.

programme.title: Mythica 2

When a powerful relic is stolen, Marek faces a new sinister enemy set on reclaiming the Darkspore for his master Szorlok. Now Marek and her friends must race through creature-infested lands, to an abandoned underground city, to save themselves from an imminent deadly evil.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors is left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: Ask Me Anything
programme.desc: This edgy coming of age tale introduces beautiful, wild, young, and lost, Katie Kampenfelt who takes a year off before college to discover herself. But Katie intends to do more than just work at the local bookstore and smoke weed with her boyfriend. Drawn into a dangerous new relationship, Katie begins to chronicle her sexual adventures in an anonymous blog, allowing strangers a window into her innermost desires, shames, and secrets.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Who can she trust?

programme.title: The Pilgrim
programme.desc: The Tramp is an escaped convict who is mistaken as a pastor in a small town church.

programme.title: Il Bidone
programme.desc: Aging small-time con man Augusto, who swindles peasants, works with two younger men: Roberto, who wants to become the Italian Johnny Ray.

programme.title: The Immigrant
programme.desc: Charlie is an immigrant who endures a challenging voyage and gets into trouble as soon as he arrives in America.

programme.title: Toll Bar
programme.desc: Rauan works at a parking lot in a prestigious residential area. Aidar passes him daily in his luxurious car. The auto belongs to his father, who works in the oil business. Rauan and Aidar are both determined to build their own lives themselves. They live in the same city, their paths cross in the same yard, but there is an abyss between them. They are separated by a toll-bar between wealth and poverty. One day Aidar and Rauan will clash and their worlds will clash. What will the results be..?

programme.title: The Boat
programme.desc: Buster and his family go on a voyage on his homemade boat that proves to be one disaster after another.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: After years of hiding from a society that shuns him, Hellboy and his team attempt to stop the resurrection of an ancient witch who once spread an unstoppable plague before she was locked away by the legendary King Arthur.

programme.title: Your Highness
programme.desc: When Prince Fabious's bride is kidnapped, he goes on a quest to rescue her... accompanied by his lazy useless brother Thadeous.

programme.title: Magic Mike
programme.desc: Stripper Mike Lane has plans to leave the raunchy dance scene in favor of starting his own furniture business. Before he gets out he has one last challenge to train a young protégé on the ins and outs of the business.

programme.title: Absolute Denial
programme.desc: In an escalating battle of two minds, a reclusive programmer is plunged into a terrifying, mind-bending revelation as he becomes exposed to the social engineering of his own sentient AI. Award-winning hand drawn animation.

programme.title: Above The Shadows
programme.desc: 'Above the Shadows' is a magic realism tale about a young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible and must find her way back into the world. After more than a decade of solitude and making a living in the shadows as a paparazzi photographer, Holly meets the one man who can see her, Shayne, a down-on-his-luck MMA fighter working as a bouncer. Holly discovers that it was one of her tabloid photographs that caused his downfall and that she must restore him to his former glory if she wants to regain a foothold in the world around her. With Shayne, Holly awakens to love but also to the reality that she bears more responsibility for her fate than she imagined.

programme.title: Implanted
programme.desc: Sarah, a struggling young woman living in Brooklyn, agrees to volunteer as an experimental test subject for a pharmaceutical company called Dynamic Health Cure to be implanted with the LEXX nanochip. Sarah hopes that the money received for her participation will solve her financial troubles and help her to take care of her mother who has Alzheimer's. A nanochip is implanted in her cerebral cortex. It is designed with artificial intelligence technology to take control of the body at the inception of any disease or illness. When the implant turns sinister and orders her to commit crimes, Sarah is plunged into a murderous spiral with only one choice: to live or die.

programme.title: Blue World Order
programme.desc: The film is set in a post-apocalyptic world in which civilisation has crumbled. A massive electromagnetic pulse has killed all children on the planet with the exception of Molly (Billie Rutherford), the daughter of Jake Slater (Jake Ryan).

programme.title: JK's House
programme.desc: At JK's House, Dr. Amber Jenkins (Robin Givens) and JK (Jakayla Lawrence) blend family values and life lessons with music and dance.

programme.title: A Christmas Cruise
programme.desc: An aspiring novelist unexpectedly finds the love of her life onboard a holiday cruise.

programme.title: Advance and Retreat
programme.desc: An ambitious junior executive is reunited with her first love at a corporate retreat, ultimately realizing that she might have to take a step back to make a leap forward.

programme.title: Another Man's Wife
programme.desc: After a tragic car accident, a family gets away to a remote mountain cabin to recover and rebuild their lives. During their vacation, a handsome man befriends them only to get revenge and destroy what is left of their fragile lives.

programme.title: Just for the Summer
programme.desc: Teacher Penelope Campbell loves visiting her Grandma Dot every summer – despite her constant attempts to find Penelope a man! This year, she bumps into her childhood sweetheart Jason Humphrey, who explains his grandmother is desperate to pair him off, too.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: A self-absorbed realtor enlists the help of his neighbor when he's suddenly left in charge of the granddaughter he never knew existed until his estranged son drops her off at his home.

programme.title: Smart People
programme.desc: A widowed professor (Dennis Quaid) experiences a new love and an unexpected visit from his adopted brother.

programme.title: Can You Keep A Secret?
programme.desc: On a return flight from a botched client meeting, Emma reveals all of her deepest secrets to a handsome stranger when her plane hits turbulence and she believes she is going to die. Emma thinks she will never see the guy again.

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: A dark force threatens Alpha, a vast metropolis and home to species from a thousand planets.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg leads an all-star cast in the thrilling story of real-life heroes on a burning oil rig.

programme.title: Destruction: Las Vegas
programme.desc: As a group of college kids party in Las Vegas, a furious windstorm unlike any other descends upon the city.

programme.title: Destruction Los Angeles
programme.desc: An explosion and earthquake rock LA, so reporter John Benson seizes his chance to cover the breaking news.

programme.title: Christmas With a Crown
programme.desc: When a successful woman returns to her hometown to revive her family's Christmas festival, she meets a dashing stranger who's volunteered to help organise the event. Sparks begin to fly between them, but little does she know that he's really a prince in disguise, longing to find the true spirit of the holidays! It will take a Christmas miracle of royal proportions for their hearts to meet as one.

programme.title: The Claus Family
programme.desc: After discovering his grandfather is Santa Claus, Jules has to help him deliver his presents all around the world. But Jules' hatred for Christmas might make that more difficult than Santa thought.

programme.title: How to Ruin the Holidays
programme.desc: A festive family caper starring Amber Nash (Archer, Mr. Robot) as a struggling comedian who reluctantly returns home for Christmas. Upon her arrival, she must not only deal with her eccentric and wildly dysfunctional family, but ultimately has a life-changing decision to make about her father and special-needs brother.

programme.title: Last Days in the Desert
programme.desc: As Jesus begins his journey out of the wilderness following forty days of fasting and praying, he struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis. This powerful drama depicting an imagined chapter from Jesus' life stars Golden Globe winner Ewan McGregor (Trainspotting, Star Wars franchise), Academy Award nominee Ciarn Hinds (Belfast, Game of Thrones), and Tye Sheridan (Mud, X-Men franchise).

programme.title: The Nutcracker Sweet
programme.desc: It is Christmas Eve and the Silberhaus children are excited for the festivities to begin. Marie and Fritz are playing in the children's room when their godfather Drosselmayer arrives and presents them with an early Christmas gift, a Nutcracker. Marie witnesses a great battle between a vast army of toy soldiers led by the Nutcracker against a terrible platoon of mice commanded by the Mouse King. Follow Marie and Fritz's journey in the Kingdom of Dolls, through the Christmas Forest, past the Almond Milk Sea, and the Palace of the Marzipans.

programme.title: Grumpy Cat's Worst Christmas Ever
programme.desc: Grumpy Cat, with 6m Facebook fans, stars in a Lifetime movie.

programme.title: Becoming Santa
programme.desc: Holly decides to introduce her boyfriend Connor to her family up north.

programme.title: THE FLIGHT BEFORE CHRISTMAS
programme.desc: Stephanie is originally planning to spend the holidays moving.

programme.title: Grumpy Cat's Worst Christmas Ever
programme.desc: Grumpy Cat, with 6m Facebook fans, stars in a Lifetime movie.

programme.title: Final Days
programme.desc: A world in chaos, a pandemic left unchecked and humanity on the brink of extinctionThis is no time to be alone! As a deadly virus turns humanity into bloodthirsty plague carriers, its a fight for survival. Aiden (Tyler Posey - Teen Wolf) awakes to discover the world he knew overnight has become an apocalyptic nightmare. Locked in his apartment alone, he soon begins to lose all sense of time.

programme.title: Into The Ashes
programme.desc: With an honest job and a loving wife, Nick Brenner believed he had safely escaped his violent, criminal history. But his old crew, hasn't forgotten about him or the money he stole, and when they take what Nick now values the most, he has nothing left to lose. Confronted by the town sheriff, Nick must decide if he will stay on his new path or indulge in his need for revenge and force his enemies to pay for what they have done.

programme.title: Dog Eat Dog
programme.desc: Based on true events and directed by visionary filmmaker Paul Schrader (Raging Bull), this high-octane crime thriller stars Academy Award winner Nicolas Cage (Snowden) and Willem Dafoe (John Wick). Three men, all out of prison, now have the task of adapting themselves to civilian life, until they are offered a job by an eccentric mob boss with a payoff too good to turn down.

programme.title: Prey
programme.desc: Described as Donnie Darko meets Lost and from legendary production company Blumhouse. After the tragic death of his father, millennial Toby (Logan Miller: Escape Room) is begrudgingly enrolled in a program where he must spend time on a remote island. After meeting mysterious Madeleine (Kristine Froseth: The Society), Toby realises neither of them are safe and something bloodthirsty is lurking.

programme.title: The Magical Christmas Shoe
programme.desc: A pair of magical shoes help Noelle's rediscover her Christmas spirit and find love too. Starring Erin Karpluk (2019)

programme.title: Click and Collect
programme.desc: Two neighbours must drive across the country to pick up the one toy that will make a little girl's Christmas dreams come true. Starring Stephen Merchant and Asim Chaudhry (2018)

programme.title: Christmas in Toyland
programme.desc: A data analyst for a toy company tries to save hundreds of jobs right before Christmas to help keep the in-person experience alive. Starring Vanessa Lengies (2022)

programme.title: Christmas with a Prince: The Royal Baby
programme.desc: Things get complicated for the expecting Prince Alexander and Dr. Tasha when a Royal State Visit is planned abroad where they must struggle with defying tradition. Starring Kaitlyn Leeb (2021)

programme.title: Double Holiday
programme.desc: Work rivals Rebecca and Chris are forced to collaborate when they are tasked with organising this year's holiday season office party. Stars Carly Pope and Kristoffer Polaha. (2019)

programme.title: The Song to My Heart
programme.desc: After a childhood touring with her singer-songwriter father, Bonny wants to concentrate on running her new Tea Room. But will her life change when musician Ryder Jamison comes to town? (2021)

programme.title: The 27-Hour Day
programme.desc: Work acholic Lauren goes on a retreat to disconnect from work and reconnect to nature. Will handsome ranch owner Jack help Lauren let loss and realise the importance of a work-life balance? (2021)

programme.title: Can't Buy My Love
programme.desc: Lilly, a hard-working paramedic, is focused on her job and medical school. When wealthy slacker Jeff enters her life she wants nothing to do with him, but as she spends more time with him she starts t

programme.title: In The Key Of Love
programme.desc: Music producer Jake returns home for his sister's wedding. Maggie, his ex, is the Wedding photographer. Will the romantic setting help reignite the flames?

programme.title: Love Off the Page
programme.desc: When a hopeless romantic bookworm buys a book at a mysterious bookstore, she starts dreaming about love. Starring Malone Thomas (2022)

programme.title: Champagne Charlie
programme.desc: To the boisterous, gaslit London of the 1860's came Joe Sanders and his brother Fred to seek their fortunes. They came from Leybourne in Yorkshire, where Fred was a local prizefighter.

programme.title: EVERGREEN
programme.desc: Jessie Matthews plays two roles in this Rodgers and Hart musical comedy.

programme.title: LONDON TOWN
programme.desc: Jerry, a comedian, has been promised a part in a London show, so he packs up and moves there with his daughter.

programme.title: DAYBREAK
programme.desc: Eddie is a man with a secret - his second job is that of public hangman. When he falls into the canal following a fight with a youth over his wife, his body is not found. A thriller with unexpected twists.

programme.title: NEUTRAL PORT
programme.desc: When a German U-boat sinks Captain Ferguson's ship he vows revenge. The intelligence officers wish to follow the U-boat. Captain Ferguson disobeys these orders and breaks navy policy. How will he achieve his mission with his reputation still intact?

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: Saving Christmas
programme.desc: In this clever, crazy family adventure starring comedy legend Edward Asner, Danny and his brainy buddies launch an "X-Files"-style investigation to discover the truth about Santa. But they have no clue that St. Nick (Asner) is real—and he's making toys right in their hometown!

programme.title: Reprisal
programme.desc: This gritty, action-packed crime thriller pairs action legends Bruce Willis and Frank Grillo in a chilling tale of justice and revenge. After surviving a brutal bank robbery, Jacob teams with his ex-cop neighbor to track down the ruthless thief and avenge the assault...

programme.title: Song to Song
programme.desc: BV and Faye are a song-writing couple trying to forge their way in the Austin music scene. However, their relationship grows complicated when they fall into the orbit of a big-shot producer and his waitress muse.

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: In 1776 South Carolina, widower Benjamin Martin (Gibson) finds himself thrust into the midst of the American Revolutionary War as he helplessly watches his family being torn apart by the savage forces of the British Redcoats. When his oldest son's wife is ruthlessly killed, and his young son is shot through the back before his eyes, Martin is unable to suppress the soldier within that he tried to bury with his own military past. Unable to remain silent, he recruits a band of unlikely volunteers to take up arms against the British. Fighting to protect his famliy's freedom and his country's independence, Martin discovers the pain of betrayal, the redemption of revenge, and the passion of love.

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: A young prince battles aliens and sorcerers to rescue his princess from the Beast on the fantastic planet Krull.

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Four drifters arrive in a small frontier town and become unlikely heroes in a battle against a powerful family and a corrupt sheriff.

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five best friends from college (Scarlett Johansson, Kate McKinnon, Jillian Bell, Ilana Glazer and Zoë Kravitz) reunite 10 years later for a wild weekend getaway in Miami. Their outrageous antics and hard partying result in hilarious unexpected consequences which land them in a seemingly impossible situation to escape.

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five best friends from college (Scarlett Johansson, Kate McKinnon, Jillian Bell, Ilana Glazer and Zoë Kravitz) reunite 10 years later for a wild weekend getaway in Miami. Their outrageous antics and hard partying result in hilarious unexpected consequences which land them in a seemingly impossible situation to escape.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: A woman verging on thirty and frustrated in a temp secretary job takes on a yearlong culinary quest: cook all 524 recipes in Julia Child's "Mastering the Art of French Cooking." She chronicles her trials and tribulations in a blog that catches on with the food crowd.

programme.title: The Animal (2001)
programme.desc: A bumbling police file clerk takes a walk on the wild side when a mad doctor repairs his body with animal parts.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: Ex-felon, Eugene Brown, establishes a Chess Club for inner city teenagers in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Sommersby
programme.desc: A man presumed dead shows up after six years, but he may be an imposter, and could choose to hang for murder rather than reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Rover
programme.desc: Set in the near future, the mankind's greed and excesses have pushed civilization to the breaking point. Hardened loner Eric travels the desolate towns of the scorched Australian to take back the one thing that matters to him...

programme.title: Manifesto
programme.desc: "Manifesto" pays homage to the moving tradition and literary beauty of artistic manifestos, ultimately questioning the role of the artist in society today.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Deadly Inferno
programme.desc: During some extensive renovations on an eight-storey office building, a major gas leak leads to a terrible explosion, trapping the injured staff in a fiery maze. Can the brave firefighters provide a safe exit from this deadly inferno?

programme.title: Life on the Line
programme.desc: As a huge electrical storm sweeps towards Texas, lineman Beau (John Travolta, PULP FICTION) is haunted by memories of his brother's death by lightning years earlier. Bailey (Kate Bosworth, SUPERMAN RETURNS), the niece Beau helped raise, has a secret she needs to share with her boyfriend, Duncan.

programme.title: The Prince
programme.desc: Bruce Willis, John Cusack and Jason Patric face off in this action-packed thriller. A retired assassin is drawn back into the life he gave up when his daughter is kidnapped. To rescue her, he must confront his former rival.

programme.title: Setup
programme.desc: After carrying out a heist, a man is betrayed by his friend and accomplice. He vows to get revenge, joining forced with a ruthless crime lord in the process.

programme.title: Atal
programme.desc: Raised by a patriotic mother and encouraged to be courageous yet humble, Atal becomes India's most revered public hero, who paints a picture of unity in India that inspires even his opponents.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate
programme.desc: Arjun spends time with Preeta and the Aroras. When he returns home, Anjali overhears him confessing his feelings for Preeta alone in the car.

programme.title: Trinayani
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: The Good Son
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Undercover Love
programme.desc: Behind the facade of running an NGO for hearing and speech impaired children, the demure Jagadhatri Sanyal is, in reality, a fiery intelligence officer code-named JAS.

programme.title: Untangled
programme.desc: Diya, a gully badminton player, meets Arjun, a former badminton champ from an affluent family, who resents his own kin. Will Diya bring back the much-needed positivity and hope in Arujns life?

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dholi Beats
programme.desc: The story revolves around Geet, a young woman who follows her father's footsteps as a dhol player, challenging societal norms about gender roles in music. Her journey is supported by her husband, Malhar, who helps her pursue her dreams.

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.
